entity: Kobe Bryant LAL 2006-2016 #24 stint should start in 2006 (regression: data shows 1996/1999 start)
notes: Kobe switched from #8 to #24 at the start of the 2006-07 season. Flip to stable when a single 2006-2016 LAL #24 stint replaces the two broken stints.
